case_title: MICHAEL MATZ VS. PHOTON USA CORP, et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MATZ, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT PHOTON USA CORP, WHICH WILL DO BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA AS PHOTON PUBLISHING USA CORP., A DELAWARE CORPORATION PHOTON HOLDING GMBH, A FOREIGN CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MATZ, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PHOTON USA CORP, WHICH WILL DO BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA AS PHOTON PUBLISHING USA CORP., A DELAWARE CORPORATION PHOTON HOLDING GMBH, A FOREIGN CORPORATION $32,573.06 PRINCIPAL, $212.41 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $33,235.47, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
